text:
These files are empty in games/wesnoth-devel

    files/patch-Makefile.in
    files/patch-configure
    files/patch-src-Makefile.in
    files/patch-window_builder.cpp

and should be removed. It would be nice if they appear in Attic as
non-empty files. But for that one needs to erase last revision in them...

Ref: last reply in ports/137384
